name: io.github.mecha1610/mcp-llm-studio
title: LM Studio
description: Bridge MCP clients (Claude Code, Desktop, Codex, VS Code) to a local LM Studio instance.

environmentVariables.name: LM_STUDIO_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the LM Studio REST server (native /api/v1 + OpenAI-compat /v1).

environmentVariables.name: LM_STUDIO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional Bearer token; only needed if LM Studio is configured with authentication enabled.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_SESSIONS_DB
environmentVariables.description: Path to the SQLite database used by the chat tool to persist multi-turn history. Parent directory is created if missing.

environmentVariables.name: LM_STUDIO_TIMEOUT_DEFAULT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Fetch timeout in milliseconds for model_list, model_unload, embed, and download-start.

environmentVariables.name: LM_STUDIO_TIMEOUT_INFERENCE_MS
environmentVariables.description: Fetch timeout in milliseconds for ask and chat.

environmentVariables.name: LM_STUDIO_TIMEOUT_LOAD_MS
environmentVariables.description: Fetch timeout in milliseconds for model_load. Raise for very large models.

environmentVariables.name: LM_STUDIO_SSE_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Per-chunk idle timeout in milliseconds for streaming ask responses.

environmentVariables.name: LM_STUDIO_DOWNLOAD_POLL_INTERVAL_MS
environmentVariables.description: Polling cadence in milliseconds for model_download progress checks.

environmentVariables.name: LM_STUDIO_DOWNLOAD_POLL_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Overall poll budget in milliseconds for model_download before returning a progress-in-flight status.
